Class WaitingListController

java.lang.Object
logicControllers.WaitingListController
public class WaitingListController extends Object
Controller responsible for managing the restaurant's waiting list and real-time reservation logic. This class implements the decision-making engine that determines whether a guest can be immediately accommodated (based on current table availability) or should be added to the waiting list.

    • WaitingListController

  • Method Details

    • addToWaitingList

      public ServerResponse addToWaitingList(Integer userID, String email, String phone, int numOfGuests, LocalDate date, LocalTime time)
      Processes a request to join the restaurant at a specific time. 1. Validates group size against maximum table capacity. 2. Checks current availability using a greedy table-assignment algorithm. 3. Confirms a reservation if space is available; otherwise, adds the guest to the waiting list.
      Parameters:
      userID - The ID of the registered user (null for walk-in guests).
      email - Contact email for notifications.
      phone - Contact phone for notifications.
      numOfGuests - Size of the dining party.
      date - The desired dining date.
      time - The desired dining time.
      Returns:
      A ServerResponse containing the resulting Reservation or WaitingListEntry.

    • canFitReservation

      private boolean canFitReservation(LocalDate date, LocalTime time, int newGroupSize)
      Internal algorithm to determine if a new group can fit in the restaurant. Uses a 'Greedy' approach: sorts groups and tables by size and attempts to find a valid seating configuration for all active reservations plus the new request.
      Returns:
      true if a configuration exists where everyone has a table.

    • scheduleAutoCancel

      private void scheduleAutoCancel(int reservationID)
      Schedules an automatic task to cancel a reservation if the guest fails to check in within 15 minutes of their scheduled time.
      Parameters:
      reservationID - The ID of the reservation to monitor.

    • cancelWaiting

      public ServerResponse cancelWaiting(int confirmationCode, Integer currentUserId)
      Removes a guest from the waiting list manually upon their request.
      Parameters:
      confirmationCode - The unique code provided at registration.
      currentUserId - The ID of the user requesting cancellation (for security validation).
      Returns:
      ServerResponse indicating if the cancellation was processed.

    • getWaitingListBetweenDates

      public List<WaitingListEntry> getWaitingListBetweenDates(LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate)
      Retrieves historical waiting list data for reporting and analytics.

    • generateConfirmationCode

      private int generateConfirmationCode()
      Generates a 6-digit confirmation code and ensures it is unique within the current waiting list.
